Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/permits | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Permits returned: {len\(data\)}'\)
if data:
    p = data[0]
    print\(f'First permit: {p[\\"name\\"]} | status={p[\\"status\\"]} | daysInQueue={p[\\"daysInQueue\\"]} | avgDays={p[\\"avgDays\\"]} | docs={p[\\"documentCount\\"]} | inspections={p[\\"inspectionCount\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)
